attributes.additional_details: We should have an act called "aarons law" men can check the history of the woman and if they have previously made allegations towards men. Too many innocent men are ending up in jail and committing suicide because they are with someone who can switch on them and say anything about someone with absolutely no worry of the man ever getting justice. No warning, just mens lives ruined all over the country and women have developed a culture of lying knowing absolutely nothing will happen to them
attributes.background: There should be a law the men can check if the woman they are seeing have made false allegations to men previously.

rejection.details: We cannot accept this petition as we are unclear about the action that you are seeking. We are not sure how "false allegations" would be identified or logged, where they would be logged, or by who, or who would decide what constitutes a false allegation.
